description_long: This object consists of three swords of varying lengths, each featuring a straight, double-edged blade with a pointed tip. The blades are metallic and dark in color, suggesting a steel or iron composition. Each sword has a prominent circular guard separating the blade from the handle, which is wrapped in a yellowish material, likely for improved grip. The handles are cylindrical and capped with a rounded pommel, providing balance and a secure hold. The overall design is utilitarian, with no visible decorative elements, indicating a focus on function over ornamentation. The set appears robust and suitable for practical use, possibly as training or utility swords.
description: A set of three straight, double-edged swords with dark metallic blades and yellow-wrapped cylindrical handles, each featuring a circular guard and rounded pommel.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length and profile of all three swords, highlighting the straight blades and the yellow-wrapped handles.
description_view_1: View from the handle end, displaying the rounded pommels and the circular guards, with the blades extending away from the viewer.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again showing the full length of the swords, with the handles and guards clearly visible.
description_view_3: View from the blade tips, emphasizing the pointed ends and the alignment of the three swords, with the handles receding into the background.
